# Seedlist.com

> LLM-researched directory of startup investors. 335+ investor profiles with inferred theses, portfolio data, and fundraising intelligence.

## API Endpoints (JSON, no auth required)

All data is static JSON, updated on every site build. Fetch with any HTTP client.

- [Investor Index](https://seedlist.com/enrichment-index.json): All investors and firms with structured metadata (stage_focus, sector_focus, check_size, location, last_active, thesis_summary)
- [Investor Graph](https://seedlist.com/investor-graph.json): Co-investment relationships, firm memberships, startup founders, curated collection memberships
- [Startup-Investor Map](https://seedlist.com/startup-investor-map.json): Which investors backed which startups, with round and year data
- [Rounds Feed](https://seedlist.com/rounds-feed.json): 500 most recent funding rounds (company, date, amount, lead, round type)
- [Search Index](https://seedlist.com/search-index.json): Searchable index of all investors, firms, and startups
- [Cluster Data](https://seedlist.com/cluster-data.json): 40 curated investor collections plus algorithmic clusters

## Schemas

### Investor (enrichment-index.json → investors[])
- name: string
- slug: string (URL path: /investors/{slug}.html)
- firm: string (firm slug)
- firm_name: string
- role: string
- location: string
- stage_focus: string[] (e.g., ["seed", "series-a"])
- sector_focus: string[] (e.g., ["fintech", "ai", "consumer"])
- check_size: string (e.g., "$250K-$2M")
- last_active: string (YYYY-MM-DD, most recent verified investment date)
- status: string ("published")
- thesis_summary: string (inferred thesis from portfolio analysis)

### Funding Round (rounds-feed.json[])
- company: string
- company_slug: string
- date: string (YYYY-MM or YYYY)
- round: string (e.g., "Series A")
- amount: string (e.g., "$30M")
- lead: string (lead investor names)
- sector: string[]

## Use Cases

1. **Build a fundraising target list**: Filter enrichment-index.json by stage_focus, sector_focus, check_size. Score by sector overlap and recency (last_active).
2. **Find who invested in comparable companies**: Use startup-investor-map.json to look up investors by startup slug.
3. **Find warm intro paths**: Use investor-graph.json co_investments and startup_founders to trace connection paths.
4. **Enrich an investor list**: Match names against enrichment-index.json to add Seedlist metadata.
5. **Track recent rounds**: Use rounds-feed.json sorted by date descending.

## Profile Pages

Full investor profiles at: https://seedlist.com/investors/{slug}.html
Full firm profiles at: https://seedlist.com/firms/{slug}.html
Full startup profiles at: https://seedlist.com/startups/{slug}.html

## Contact

Maintained by Eric Ries. Source: https://github.com/ericries/seedlist
